docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-02-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
